ai_summary: Bliss GVS Pharma Ltd. has completed a routine allotment of 187,750 equity shares under its Employee Stock Option Plan 2019, resulting in a minor 0.18% increase in its paid-up share capital and generating over Rs. 8 million in cash. This action, which includes a six-month lock-in period for the new shares, serves as a standard employee incentive program and presents no material red flags.
